message:
test(trace): add happens-before and optimality property tests for geodesic normalization

Add correctness sketch documentation and two new property-based tests for
the geodesic normalization algorithm.

- Add preserves_happens_before() helper function for schedule validation
- Add prop_happens_before_preserved test: verifies normalized schedules
  always respect causal dependency ordering
- Add prop_default_min_switches_small test: verifies the default schedule
  is optimal for small traces by comparing against exact solver
- Document the correctness argument inline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
